subject: Streamlining operations at Line Dental
body:
Hi Line Dental team,

I'm a Columbia MBA and former Citi investment banking VP who now helps growing businesses cut operational waste and streamline workflows. Before banking, I spent years in FP&A and systems implementation — including driving $18M in recurring cost reductions at FedEx.

Across dental, I'm seeing the same pattern — front desk staff buried in scheduling, insurance verification, and patient intake paperwork instead of focusing on patient experience.

I offer what I call an Operations Blueprint: a 60-minute deep dive where we map your current workflows, identify the highest-ROI automation opportunities, and outline exactly how to implement them — with a full written roadmap delivered within 48 hours.

If this sounds useful, happy to start with a quick intro call to see if it's a fit.

Best,
Brandon Rye

Hi Aleris Home Health team,

I'm a Columbia MBA and former Citi investment banking VP who now helps growing businesses cut operational waste and streamline workflows. Before banking, I spent years in FP&A and systems implementation — including driving $18M in recurring cost reductions at FedEx.

Across senior care, I'm seeing the same pattern — coordinators spending hours on caregiver scheduling, compliance documentation, and family communication that should be automated.

I offer what I call an Operations Blueprint: a 60-minute deep dive where we map your current workflows, identify the highest-ROI automation opportunities, and outline exactly how to implement them — with a full written roadmap delivered within 48 hours.

If this sounds useful, happy to start with a quick intro call to see if it's a fit.

Best,
Brandon Rye

I'm a Columbia MBA and former Citi investment banking VP who now helps growing businesses cut operational waste and streamline workflows. Before banking, I spent years in FP&A and systems implementation — including driving $18M in recurring cost reductions at FedEx.

Across growing businesses, I'm seeing the same pattern — teams spending 15-20 hours a week on processes that should take 2-3 due to manual workflows and lack of automation.

I offer what I call an Operations Blueprint: a 60-minute deep dive where we map your current workflows, identify the highest-ROI automation opportunities, and outline exactly how to implement them — with a full written roadmap delivered within 48 hours.

If this sounds useful, happy to start with a quick intro call to see if it's a fit.

Best,
Brandon Rye

I'm a Columbia MBA and former Citi investment banking VP who now helps growing businesses cut operational waste and streamline workflows. Before banking, I spent years in FP&A and systems implementation — including driving $18M in recurring cost reductions at FedEx.

I'm a Columbia MBA and former Citi investment banking VP who now helps growing businesses cut operational waste and streamline workflows. Before banking, I spent years in FP&A and systems implementation — including driving $18M in recurring cost reductions at FedEx.

If this sounds useful, happy to start with a quick intro call to see if it's a fit.

Best,
Brandon Rye

Hi Sweet Briar CDC Austin team,

I'm a Columbia MBA and former Citi investment banking VP who now helps growing businesses cut operational waste and streamline workflows. Before banking, I spent years in FP&A and systems implementation — including driving $18M in recurring cost reductions at FedEx.

Across education and childcare, I'm seeing the same pattern — enrollment, parent communication, and staff scheduling managed through email and paper sign-up sheets.

I offer what I call an Operations Blueprint: a 60-minute deep dive where we map your current workflows, identify the highest-ROI automation opportunities, and outline exactly how to implement them — with a full written roadmap delivered within 48 hours.

If this sounds useful, happy to start with a quick intro call to see if it's a fit.

Best,
Brandon Rye

I'm a Columbia MBA and former Citi investment banking VP who now helps growing businesses cut operational waste and streamline workflows. Before banking, I spent years in FP&A and systems implementation — including driving $18M in recurring cost reductions at FedEx.

Across construction and remodeling, I'm seeing the same pattern — crews running on text messages and paper estimates while job costing and change orders fall through the cracks.

I offer what I call an Operations Blueprint: a 60-minute deep dive where we map your current workflows, identify the highest-ROI automation opportunities, and outline exactly how to implement them — with a full written roadmap delivered within 48 hours.

If this sounds useful, happy to start with a quick intro call to see if it's a fit.

Best,
Brandon Rye
